name: CHICKWEED
short_description: CHICKWEED - A strange creature has escaped from the lab... and that creature is you! Fight your way to freedom through hordes of enemies, dangerous traps and treacherous ambushes in this hardcore platformer and uncover the mystery of the running bush!
detailed_description:
CHICWEED is a 2D adventure about a laboratory creature, a strange creature has escaped from the laboratory... and that creature is you! Fight your way to freedom through hordes of enemies, dangerous traps and treacherous ambushes in this hardcore platformer and solve the mystery of the running bush! Carefully study the locations - the terrain of the levels can be used to overcome obstacles, collect glowing spheres and set records, get to the last level and prove to everyone that you deserve it!

Peculiarities:
- Nice graphics by Jinkos
- Nice soundtrack by Deyouiki
- unforgettable adventure
